rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_close_8
rule_metadata.description: Very high entropy - random stream, packed data or encryption

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_close_8 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Very high entropy - random stream, packed data or encryption"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 7.5
}

rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_7
rule_metadata.description: High entropy - probably random stream, packed data or encryption

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_7 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "High entropy - probably random stream, packed data or encryption"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 7 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 7.5
}

rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_6
rule_metadata.description: High entropy - like binary code or base64 encoded random stream

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_6 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "High entropy - like binary code or base64 encoded random stream"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 6 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 7
}

import "math"

rule math_entropy_5 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Medium entropy - like binary data"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 5 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 6
}

rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_4
rule_metadata.description: Low entropy - like plaintext or HTML or sparse data

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_4 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Low entropy - like plaintext or HTML or sparse data"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 4 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 5
}

rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_3
rule_metadata.description: Low entropy - very sparse data or repeating plaintext

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_3 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Low entropy - very sparse data or repeating plaintext"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 3 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 4
}

rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_2
rule_metadata.description: Very low entropy - repeating sequence of couple of bytes

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_2 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Very low entropy - repeating sequence of couple of bytes"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 2 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 3
}

import "math"

rule math_entropy_1 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Very low entropy - repeating 2 bytes"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 1 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 2
}

rule_metadata.name: math_entropy_0
rule_metadata.description: Very low entropy - all zeroes or same bytes

rules.rule_text:
import "math"

rule math_entropy_0 : info statistics
{
	meta:
		description = "Very low entropy - all zeroes or same bytes"

	condition:
		math.entropy( 0 , filesize ) >= 0 and math.entropy ( 0 , filesize ) < 1
}
